title: carex distans var. neglecta
intro: Carex distans var. neglecta, also known as the distant sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex distans var. neglecta include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat conditions like arthritis, bronchitis, and kidney problems.
